name: Garlic Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 pound beef top round steak, cut 1 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the steak sauce, oil, pepper and garlic in a bowl.
2. Place the steak in a resealable bag; add the marinade, making sure the steak is well coated.
3. Seal the bag securely.
4. Refrigerate the bag for at least 1 hour, turning the bag occasionally to ensure even coating.
5. Remove the steak from the marinade and place it on a broiler pan so that the surface of the meat is 3-4 inches away from the heat source.
6. Broil the steak for 15 to 18 minutes, turning once, until it reaches the desired doneness (rare to medium rare).
